import React from "react"; import Chart from "./Chart"; import { CURRENCY } from "../config/config_products"; const StatisticsTableClients = (props) => { let count = 1; let itemProduct = arrayEntriesClients.map(entry => { return {count++} {entry[0]} {entry[1].count} {CURRENCY + ' ' + (Number(entry[1].totalPurchases)).toFixed(2)} }) return
Most visited customers:
{itemProduct}
# Client name Number of purchases Total purchases
} export default StatisticsTableClients;
